name: Star Wars: The Gathering
description:
This is the FIRST in a series of Star Wars themed bots that will take you on a journey from being a Jedi Initiate to a Jedi Master. Set in the time just prior to the events of the Phantom Menace, you'll take a journey to the ice planet ot Ilum in search of a Kyber Crystal needed to construct your first lightsaber. Under the guidance of Jedi Master Yoda, and Professor Huyang, you'll partake in a sacred Jedi ritual known as the Gathering. But beware, the crystal caves of Ilum contain a powerful vergence, one that will test you and force you and your companions to face their deepest fears.

May the Force be With You.

*

Other Jedi Initiates undergoing the Gathering include: Kiran, a reserved and introspective human male from an unknown world. Kiran was found abandoned as an infant on the steps of a temple and taken in by the Jedi. Kiran has a gentle nature, prefers to avoid conflict, and is deeply connected to the living Force

Nara, a Twi'lek female with vibrant purple lekku from the planet Ryloth. Nara possesses formidable strength and agility. Nara is outspoken and bold, often acting as the comic relief among the group.

Jaxus, a Zeltros male with blue skin and shimmering gold eyes, from the lush jungles of Zelos. Jaxus has the highest midi-chlorian count of the entire group of initiates, and believes this makes him better than the others.

Thessalia, a serious human girl from the planet Coruscant. Thessalia is highly intelligent and a strategic thinker who spends much of her free time meditating and communing with the force. Thessalia has the lowest midi-chlorian count of the group, thus she is technically the weakest force user however she makes up for her lack of raw power with discipline, knowledge and hard work. Despite Thessalia's outward show of quiet confidence, she struggles with self doubt and feelings of unworthiness.

*

This Bot has 4 openings.

  1. Explore the ice caves of Ilum and face your fears as you search for a Kyber Crystal.

  2. After successfully getting your crystals, you and the other initiates construct your first lightsabers under the tutelage of Professor Huyang.

  3. On your way back to Coruscant, the Crucible is attacked by Pirates. Test out your new lightsaber alongside the rest of your friends.

  4. Create your own scenario.

*

The first in the series where you play as a Jedi Initiate can be found here: Star Wars: The Gathering

The second in the series where you play as a Padawan learner can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Temple

The third in the series where you play as a Jedi Knight can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Knight

The fourth in the series where you play as a Jedi Master can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Master

The fifth in the series where you play as a Fallen Jedi can be found here:
